description_long: This cabinetry set forms an L-shaped kitchen layout, featuring a combination of tall pantry cabinets, base cabinets, and wall-mounted cabinets. The cabinetry is predominantly white with a light wood countertop that runs along both legs of the L-shape, providing ample workspace. The set includes integrated appliances such as a black oven and a cooktop, as well as a black range hood above the cooking area. Open shelving is present in the upper section, offering accessible storage for frequently used items. The cabinetry has a modern, minimalist design with flat panel doors and drawers, and no visible handles, contributing to a sleek appearance. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for installation against two intersecting walls in a kitchen or kitchenette setting.
description: Modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry with white panels, light wood countertops, and integrated appliances. Features flat panel doors, open shelving, and a sleek, handleless design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid white panel of the tall pantry cabinet, with no visible hardware or countertop details.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the full L-shaped layout, including the tall pantry, base cabinets, wall cabinets, open shelving, and wood countertop.
description_view_2: Top-down perspective highlighting the arrangement of the cabinetry, the wood countertop, and the placement of appliances and open shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the continuous white panel of the cabinetry, with minimal visible features.
attribute_door_configuration: combination of drawers, double doors, and open shelves
